human_step_name: Establish the post-DC finite-Gamma raw object
operation_details: Use the low-frequency source to form the one-dimensional DC expression while retaining Gamma exactly; the project summary records omega2=-omega1 and extraction of the required low-frequency coefficient without a Gamma-Laurent expansion.
assumptions: DC limit is taken before closed-form simplification
source_locator: direct human boundary; fullmodify4_summary_report.pdf source diagram
verification_evidence: No Gamma-Laurent expansion in the source-provenance report
caveats: Exact notebook commands and raw checksum are missing from the conversation bundle.

human_step_name: Separate the explicit finite-Gamma DC expression
operation_details: Produce Sigma_abc_dc_1D-separated.txt with explicit PolyGamma blocks, finite-Gamma rational denominators, h^x/ha and h^{xx}/haa monomials, and band energies.
coefficient_mapping: term -> PolyGamma order, branch, Gamma power, scalar coefficient, monomial, denominator
verification_evidence: File contains PolyGamma orders and exact finite-Gamma denominators

human_step_name: Abstract explicit band labels to the projected N-band notation
operation_details: Map explicit labels 1,2,3 to n,m,l and construct projected N-band sums while keeping all Cartesian indices already fixed to k.
verification_evidence: Scope audit: projected h^k,h^{kk},h^{kkk}, not independent tensor heads
caveats: Does not establish full tensorial sigma_abc.

human_step_name: Build the PolyGamma coefficient-row representation
operation_details: Serialize each row by sector s, PolyGamma order r, branch eta, explicit Gamma power q, scalar coefficient, matrix monomial, and denominator.
verification_evidence: Rows retain source IDs and exact denominators

human_step_name: Partition into center, pair, and loop sectors
operation_details: Use C0 for no-internal-band rows, C1 for a single distinct internal band, and C2 for a genuine third distinct band.

human_step_name: Verify the raw sector reconstruction
operation_details: Evaluate I_raw-(I_center_raw+I_pair_raw+I_loop_raw).

human_step_name: Apply the projected matrix-element dictionary
operation_details: Introduce band velocities, Berry connections, energy gaps, shift-vector structures, derivative-like pair structures, and loop products.
assumptions: Nondegenerate ordered pairs where denominators are used
verification_evidence: Projected matrix-element dictionary printed in the report
caveats: The local R12 h-matrix formula is two-band specific.

human_step_name: Close the pair hxx geometry
operation_details: Split P_R and P_L into shift and derivative-like pieces using the verified antisymmetric and symmetric closure identities.
coefficient_mapping: 46 pair residual rows -> 14 target hxx rows -> 10 shift entries + 12 derivative candidates + 32 remaining diagonal-velocity rows
caveats: Earlier symmetric identity P_R+P_L=X was provisional; final supplement retains an additional 2 B_v,epsilon term.

human_step_name: Collect the center sector
operation_details: Collect single-band terms into I_center=sum_a v_a^3 K_c(a).
caveats: Center sector is not claimed IBP-exact.

human_step_name: Canonicalize the genuine three-band loop sector
operation_details: Group oriented three-band products into Re L_abc and Im L_abc with L_abc=A_ab A_bc A_ca.
index_mapping: forward/reverse loop orientation -> Re/Im orbit classes
source_locator: theoretical supplement, Supplementary Note 7; K_loop_ReL.wl; K_loop_ImL.wl
caveats: Loop-sector IBP exactness is not claimed.

human_step_name: Fuse the physical rows into seven kernels
operation_details: Fuse the post-expansion/post-orbit coefficient inventory into K_center, K_pair_R, K_pair_vminus, K_pair_vplus, K_pair_vepsilon, K_loop_ReL, and K_loop_ImL.
source_locator: theoretical supplement, reduction diagram and Supplementary Note 8
caveats: 208 is not the raw provenance row count.

human_step_name: Perform the targeted pair v-epsilon IBP
operation_details: Use the explicit primitive F_epsilon^(0) to remove the r=0 v-epsilon residual.
caveats: No center or loop IBP authorization.

human_step_name: Run the residual-driven rational primitive solve
operation_details: Accept four rational primitives and reduce ten residual components to six cokernel components.

human_step_name: Run the global coupled pair IBP solve
operation_details: Prove the remaining six pair cokernel components are total derivatives.
source_locator: theoretical supplement, Supplementary Note 6, Lemma 3; global_coupled_IBP_primitives.wl

human_step_name: Validate the full pair post-IBP reconstruction
operation_details: Construct F_pair_total and verify I_pair_full-I_pair_R-partial_k F_pair_total=0.
caveats: Explicit primitive formulas are not embedded in this extraction bundle.

human_step_name: Assemble the final four-kernel projected closed form
operation_details: Retain K_c, K_R, K_ReL, and K_ImL; place all three pair-velocity kernels in the explicit BZ total derivative.
caveats: Projected sigma_xxx only; modulo the named BZ total derivative.

human_step_name: Compare the pair and loop structures with supplied reference targets
operation_details: Apply Delta_Anan=-d for the pair-shift plus branch; compare loop geometry without promoting coefficient equality.
caveats: No full Eq. (5) equality; loop Eq. (7) comparison is structural only.

human_step_name: Specialize to the two-band spinless-TRS Rice–Mele model
operation_details: Set epsilon_1=-E and epsilon_2=+E, remove the empty distinct-triple loop sum, apply TRS parity to the center integral, and retain the ordered-pair shift sector.
verification_evidence: pair velocity represented by partial_k F_pair_total
caveats: Model-specific; does not imply general multiband vanishing.

human_step_name: Render the complete two-band target-inspired finite-Gamma normal form
operation_details: Use the exact Modify4 two-band kernel in the Modify5-v2 ordered-pair basis with PG blocks, d, v, |A|^2, R, X', and diagonal acceleration identities.
index_mapping: m is the opposite band of n
verification_evidence: File states it is the target-inspired normal form of the exact Modify4 two-band kernel
caveats: No additional total-derivative equivalence is claimed beyond its validated identities.

human_step_name: Validate physical-basis and Modify4-to-Modify5 reductions
operation_details: Compare pointwise raw h-basis and geometric decomposition, and compare the integrated Modify4 specialization with the established longitudinal result.
caveats: Numerical support is not symbolic equality.

human_step_name: Validate figures, meshes, and post-raw Gamma scaling
operation_details: Evaluate sigma_xxx(mu,Gamma,beta), check heatmap-linecut and mesh consistency, and fit small-Gamma behavior after the exact finite-Gamma formula is established.
caveats: Fit windows and all original data files are not present in the conversation.

human_step_name: Pre-raw Gamma-expansion interpretation
operation_details: Earlier wording treated the raw object as if it were produced after expanding in Gamma.
caveats: Forbidden and excluded from the active replay chain.

human_step_name: Conservative no-nontrivial-IBP evaluator
operation_details: An earlier supplement evaluated I_raw=I_IBP+partial_k 0 and used no nontrivial IBP.
verification_evidence: pointwise and integrated differences vanished in that evaluator
caveats: Superseded as the description of the final active multiband pair-reduction chain.

human_step_name: Early truncated Gamma-plus-Gamma-squared Rice–Mele plotting branch
operation_details: Plot Gamma sigma^(1)+Gamma^2 sigma^(2) with t0=1, delta_t=0.5, m=0.2 because the exact finite-Gamma response was unavailable in that folder.
caveats: Not the final exact finite-Gamma figure pipeline; parameter set differs.

human_step_name: Promote projected band abstraction to full tensorial sigma_abc
operation_details: Treat projected h^k,h^{kk},h^{kkk} as if independent Cartesian heads had been retained.
